title: alchemilla splendens var. fulgens
intro: Alchemilla splendens var. fulgens, also known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and menstrual disorders, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Alchemilla splendens var. fulgens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
